# Change Log — famililook-shared

### 2026-04-18 — CR-SHARED-07 — Sprint X Phase X6: Currency and Locale Intelligence

**Files added:**
- src/locale/currencyConfig.js — 4 currencies (GBP/USD/EUR/CAD), locale-to-currency map, USD global default
- src/locale/useCurrency.js — currency hook with Intl.NumberFormat, AppStorage override > navigator.language > USD fallback
- src/locale/useLocale.js — locale detection hook, AppStorage override > navigator.language > en-US fallback
- src/locale/index.js — barrel export
- tests/locale/currencyConfig.test.js — 9 tests
- tests/locale/useCurrency.test.js — 9 tests
- tests/locale/barrel.test.js — 6 tests

**Package.json:** Added `./locale` export path
**Test count:** 271 → 295 (+24 locale tests)
**Status:** Built in shared package. Consumer integration (desktop2 CurrencyContext migration + desktop6 hardcoded £ replacement) is a separate task.

---

### 2026-04-18 — CR-SHARED-06 — Sprint X Phase X4: Micro-Reward Architecture

**Files added:**
- src/rewards/CelebrationBurst.jsx — 3-tier confetti (40/80/150 particles at 70/80/90%), chemistry-specific palettes, pattern.celebration haptic
- src/rewards/MicroReward.jsx — generic reward wrapper (4 types: achievement/rare/milestone/social), milestone uses pattern.celebration not heartbeat (UPL)
- src/rewards/StatHighlight.jsx — product-aware rarity labels (gaming vocab for Match, family vocab for Look), 4s auto-dismiss
- src/rewards/ProgressReveal.jsx — 8-icon animated loading, accelerating curve (500/375/250ms), 50ms cascade fast-forward
- src/rewards/useVariableReward.js — session-scoped rare stat injection, product-aware rarity labels
- src/rewards/index.js — barrel export
- tests/rewards/barrel.test.js — 11 tests
- tests/rewards/CelebrationBurst.test.jsx — 6 tests
- tests/rewards/MicroReward.test.jsx — 4 tests
- tests/rewards/StatHighlight.test.jsx — 4 tests
- tests/rewards/useVariableReward.test.js — 5 tests

**Gates cleared:**
1. UPL gate: 5 questions reviewed — variable reward APPROVED, confetti threshold MODIFIED (75→70, 3 tiers), milestone haptic MODIFIED (heartbeat→celebration), progress timing MODIFIED (accelerating curve), celebration copy APPROVED (Option B: label only)
2. Dark pattern audit: CLEAR

**Package.json:** Added `canvas-confetti` dependency, `framer-motion` peerDependency
**Test count:** 295 → 325 (+30 reward tests)
**Status:** Built in shared package. Consumer integration is a separate task.

---

### 2026-04-18 — CR-SHARED-05 — Sprint X Phase X2: Photo Quality Intelligence

**Files added:**
- src/photo/usePhotoQuality.js — client-side photo quality scoring hook with JSDoc adapter contract. Dependency injection for face detector (singleton strategy, CEO-approved). Canvas-based checks: brightness, Laplacian blur, DCT compression, resolution.
- src/photo/PhotoQualityRing.jsx — animated quality ring overlay. Green ring for excellent grade (micro-reward). Text-only suggestion for amber/red (no punishment framing, UPL-approved).
- src/photo/useBestShotSelector.js — multi-photo ranker (2-5 files). Parallel analysis via injected analysePhoto function.
- src/photo/index.js — barrel export + PHOTO_QUALITY_COPY (8 UPL-approved strings, tested verbatim) + PHOTO_QUALITY_GRADE_COPY + PHOTO_QUALITY_CHECKS
- tests/photo/barrel.test.js — 18 tests (exports + 8 verbatim copy assertions + grade copy)
- tests/photo/usePhotoQuality.test.js — 12 tests (null adapter confidence, face adapter, grade/suggestion logic)
- tests/photo/PhotoQualityRing.test.jsx — 11 tests (green ring, no ring for amber/red, loading pulse, timer)
- tests/photo/useBestShotSelector.test.js — 2 tests (export contract)

**Gates cleared:**
1. Singleton strategy: dependency injection via faceDetector adapter (CEO-approved 2026-04-18)
2. UPL copy review: 8 suggestion strings reviewed, 7 revised, all grounded in named psychological frameworks (CEO-approved 2026-04-18)

**Config changes:**
- vitest.config.js: added .jsx glob to include, added pool/forks config for JSDOM stability
- package.json: added @testing-library/react devDependency

**Test count:** 228 → 271 (+43 photo tests)
**Status:** Built in shared package. Consumer integration (desktop2 + desktop6) is a separate task.

---

### 2026-04-18 — CR-SHARED-04 — Upload module: compressPhoto, validateFile, photoConvert

**Files added:**
- src/upload/compressPhoto.js — client-side photo compression (1200px max, JPEG 0.8, skip <300KB)
- src/upload/validateFile.js — file type whitelist (JPEG/PNG/WebP) + 10MB ceiling
- src/upload/photoConvert.js — dataUrlToBlob, fileToPreview, cleanupPreview(s), fileToDataUrl
- src/upload/index.js — barrel export
- tests/upload/compressPhoto.test.js — 6 tests
- tests/upload/validateFile.test.js — 10 tests
- tests/upload/photoConvert.test.js — 16 tests

**Version:** 0.4.0 → 0.5.0
**Published:** @famililook/shared@0.5.0 on npm (2026-04-18)
**Test count:** 196 → 228
**Consumers wired:** desktop6 matchClient.js (fixes 413 upload failure from raw phone photos)
**Context:** Desktop6 was sending uncompressed 3-8MB phone photos, causing 413. Desktop2 had compressPhoto.js locally. Extracted to shared package so all products have it.

### 2026-04-15 — CR-SHARED-02 — Sprint X Phase X1: Theme System

**Files added:**
- src/theme/colors.js — 53 desktop2 tokens verbatim + legacy `colors` alias + 4 product palettes + frozen chemistry contract colours + chemistryColorMap
- src/theme/motion.js — spring/ease/stagger/duration (verbatim from desktop2) + 5 framer-motion variant presets (reveal, sequence, slam, drift, pulse)
- src/theme/haptics.js — new impact/pattern/setHapticsAdapter API + 3 deprecated aliases preserving original desktop2 durations
- src/theme/dopamine.js — reward vocabulary + renamed chemistry re-exports + confetti palettes (standard, achievement, per-chemistry-label keyed)
- src/theme/index.js — barrel export
- tests/theme/theme.test.js — 34 new tests

**Version impact:** minor bump 0.1.1 → 0.3.0 (CEO skipped 0.2.x)
**Published:** @famililook/shared@0.3.0 on npm (2026-04-15)
**Test count:** 88 → 122
**Commit:** 6e79e35
**Consumer repos:** desktop2, desktop4, desktop6 NOT updated — integration sprint deferred
**Architectural notes:** Barrel collision resolved via renamed chemistry re-exports in dopamine.js. Catch in haptics.js documented as intentionally silent (progressive enhancement + circular-dependency avoidance with AppErrorBus). Legacy haptics aliases preserve original desktop2 durations so existing 7 callers do not experience silent behaviour change.

---

## 2026-04-14 — Published to npm as @famililook/shared@0.1.0 (CR-SHARED-NPM-01)

### CR-SHARED-NPM-01 — Published to npm as @famililook/shared@0.1.0
**Description:** famililook-shared published as public npm package. Own GitHub repo created at github.com/Wolex42/famililook-shared.
**Context:** Vercel build failure — `file:../famililook-shared` dependency not resolvable in separate-repo deployment architecture. Rollup could not resolve `@famililook/shared/infrastructure/AppStorage` during desktop2 production build.
**Action:** Created GitHub repo, published to npm (0.1.0), updated desktop2 + desktop4 consumer repos to use npm version `^0.1.0` instead of `file:` path. CI workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`) added for automated test runs on push. Release script added for future version bumps.
**Cross-repo impact:** desktop2 (commit 9bac760), desktop4 (commit b3e3d16). Desktop6 not affected — uses inline infrastructure files, not the package.
**Risk Tier:** P1 fix (production deployment blocker)
**Status:** COMPLETE

---

## 2026-04-14 — Standalone vitest config + consumer wiring (CR-SHARED-04)

### CR-SHARED-04 — vitest.config.js + test scripts + desktop4/desktop6 wired
**Description:** Added vitest.config.js (jsdom environment, tests/**/*.test.js include pattern) and "test"/"test:run" scripts to package.json. Desktop4 and desktop6 now have `@famililook/shared: file:../famililook-shared` in dependencies with verified symlinks.
**Context:** Session A2. All 3 consumers (desktop2, desktop4, desktop6) now wired to the shared package. 88 tests pass standalone.
**Cross-repo impact:** desktop4 (commit f9eed1a) and desktop6 (commit 49e78f6) — package.json + package-lock.json updated. All tests + builds pass in both repos.
**Risk Tier:** P3 (Routine — no source code changes, dependency wiring only)
**Status:** COMPLETE

---

## 2026-04-14 — resultsContract extraction (CR-SHARED-03)

### CR-SHARED-03 — resultsContract extraction to famililook-shared
**Description:** resultsContract.js (365 lines) and resultsContract.test.js (45 tests, 401 lines) copied verbatim from desktop2. Zero internal dependencies — pure functions module, no AppErrorBus or AppStorage imports.
**Context:** famililook-shared Phase 4. Third structural module. All three infrastructure modules now in shared package.
**Cross-repo impact:** desktop2 — re-export shim installed (named + default exports), 1,444 tests passing, build PASS.
**Risk Tier:** P2
**Status:** COMPLETE

### CR-SHARED-02 — AppStorage extraction to famililook-shared
**Description:** AppStorage.js (861 lines) and AppStorage.test.js (31 tests, 394 lines) copied verbatim from desktop2. Internal `./AppErrorBus` import resolves to sibling in shared package — zero source changes.

## 2026-04-14 — AppErrorBus extraction (CR-SHARED-01)

### CR-SHARED-01 — AppErrorBus extraction to famililook-shared
**Description:** AppErrorBus.js (273 lines) and AppErrorBus.test.js (12 tests) copied verbatim from famililook-desktop2/src/infrastructure/. No source changes. Package exports map already covered this path from Phase 1 scaffolding.
**Context:** famililook-shared Phase 2. First structural module extracted. Desktop2 consumes via re-export shim. Desktop4 and desktop6 not yet wired.
